parsedData.summary: Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production systems across real-time infrastructure and applied AI. Experienced in Python, TypeScript, Next.js, React, and modern LLM-powered systems. Specializes in Kubernetes-based infrastructure for GPU-backed inference and low-latency streaming services with a focus on reliability under real traffic.

experience.description: Architected and shipped a production real-time conversational intelligence platform. Achieved ~75% classification accuracy. Built GPU accelerated distributed inference services with dynamic batching, INT8 quantization, and autoscaling.
Developed modular UI components using Next.js, React, and GraphQL. Improved initial load times by 35%. Built internal analytics tools with NumPy, Pandas, Jupyter, and Python.
Built custom TensorFlow ops for DPU Compiler. Developed neural networks for audio and vision classification. Built full-stack admin tools with Node.js, React, and GraphQL.

rawTextSample: JACOB CHAFFIN FULLSTACK ENGINEERBEVERLY HILLS 90210, UNITED STATES6503803288 DETAILS Beverly Hills 90210 United States 6503803288 jchaffin57@gmail.com LINKS Github LinkedIn Website SKILLS Applied AI/LLMs/ML Node.js/Typescript/React Python WebRTC Conversational AI LLMs PROFILE Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production systems across real-time infrastructure and applied AI. I run Kubernetes-based infrastructure for GPU-backed inference and low-latency streaming services, and I ship backend APIs and product features end-to-end with a focus on reliability under real traffic. Experienced across Python, TypeScript, Next.js, React, and modern LLM-powered systems. EMPLOYMENT HISTORY Principal AI Engineer at ProsodyAI Oct 2024 Present Architected and shipped a production real-time conversational intelligence platform performing pre ASR acoustic feature extraction (pitch contours, spectral energy, cadence, pause structure) with sub 200ms streaming inference for live agent guidance and post call analytics. Designed state space inspired temporal models (SSM/Mamba style) that convert continuous speech into structured signals (tone, intent, emotion), achieving ~75% classification accuracy in controlled evaluations and improving downstream intent detection. Implemented robust audio augmentation pipelines (noise injection, pitch/tempo variation, room impulse simulation) to improve model generalization across diverse acoustic environments. Built GPU accelerated distributed inference services (PyTorch + CUDA) with dynamic batching, INT8 quantization, and autoscaling to meet strict latency and throughput SLAs. Deployed production telemetry, distributed tracing, and concept drift monitoring to detect signal degradation and accelerate incident response. Delivered developer facing APIs powering CRM integrations, post call analytics, and predictive signaling workflows used in production. Tech: Python, PyTorch, CUDA, Kubernetes, State Space Models, Streaming Infer
